## What does this PR do?

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows the service structure (own dir, compose file, `.env.example`)
- [ ] Uses an external Docker network
- [ ] Includes a Prometheus exporter (if one exists for the service)
- [ ] `start-all.sh` and `stop-all.sh` updated
- [ ] README updated if a new service was added
- [ ] No `.env` files or `*-data/` directories committed
